feeNote: Closing fee varies by price: ₹2 (≤₹250), ₹10 (₹251–₹500), ₹25 (>₹500). This calculator uses ₹25 as the standard closing fee for items above ₹500.
h1Title: Amazon India Mobile Phones Seller Fee Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate Amazon India seller fees for Mobile Phones. Instantly find your referral fee, closing fee, total deductions, and net payout for any listing price.
seoParagraph: Amazon India charges a referral fee of 5% on the selling price for Mobile Phones and Accessories, subject to a minimum referral fee of ₹5 per unit. In addition to the referral fee, Amazon applies a closing fee that varies based on the product's selling price — ₹2 for items priced up to ₹250, ₹10 for ₹251–₹500, and ₹25 for products above ₹500. Sellers must account for both deductions to accurately calculate their net payout and maintain healthy margins on the Amazon India marketplace.

feeNote: Closing fee varies by price: ₹2 (≤₹250), ₹10 (₹251–₹500), ₹25 (>₹500). This calculator uses ₹25 as the standard closing fee for items above ₹500.
h1Title: Amazon India Electronics Seller Fee Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate Amazon India seller fees for Electronics. Find your referral fee, closing fee, and net payout instantly for any electronics listing on Amazon.in.
seoParagraph: Amazon India charges an 8% referral fee on the selling price for Consumer Electronics, with a minimum referral fee of ₹5 per transaction. A tiered closing fee is also applicable — ₹2 for products priced below ₹250, ₹10 for ₹251–₹500, and ₹25 for products above ₹500. Electronics sellers on Amazon India should factor both fees into their pricing strategy to ensure they are not underselling and eroding their profit margins.

feeNote: Closing fee varies by price: ₹2 (≤₹250), ₹10 (₹251–₹500), ₹25 (>₹500). Referral fee applies to the total selling price including any bundled accessories.
h1Title: Amazon India Clothing & Apparel Seller Fee Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate Amazon India seller fees for Clothing and Apparel. Find referral fee at 15%, closing fee, total deductions, and net payout for your fashion listings.
seoParagraph: Amazon India charges a referral fee of 15% on the selling price for Clothing, Apparel, and Fashion Accessories — one of the higher rates on the platform, reflecting the high return rates and handling costs associated with the fashion category. A standard closing fee of ₹2–₹25 is also deducted based on the product's price tier. Fashion sellers on Amazon India must price their products with these combined deductions in mind to remain profitable.

feeNote: Books attract a lower closing fee compared to other categories. Referral fee is 7.5% of the total selling price.
h1Title: Amazon India Books Seller Fee Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate Amazon India seller fees for Books. Find your 7.5% referral fee, closing fee, and exact net payout for any book listing price on Amazon.in.
seoParagraph: Amazon India applies a referral fee of 7.5% for Books, making it a relatively seller-friendly category compared to Fashion or Electronics. The closing fee for books is lower, reflecting the price-sensitive nature of the category. Independent publishers, resellers, and used-book sellers on Amazon India should use this calculator to price their listings accurately and ensure their royalties or margins are not eaten up by platform deductions.

feeNote: Closing fee varies by price: ₹2 (≤₹250), ₹10 (₹251–₹500), ₹25 (>₹500). Home & Kitchen includes items like cookware, furniture, and home décor.
h1Title: Amazon India Home & Kitchen Seller Fee Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate Amazon India seller fees for Home & Kitchen. Instantly compute your 9% referral fee, closing fee, and net payout for home products on Amazon.in.
seoParagraph: Amazon India charges a 9% referral fee on selling price for products listed under the Home & Kitchen category, which includes cookware, appliances, furniture, décor, and storage solutions. The applicable closing fee ranges from ₹2 to ₹25 depending on the item's price. Sellers in this high-volume category must calculate their landed cost — including manufacturing, shipping to Amazon fulfilment centres, and platform fees — to accurately forecast profitability per unit.

feeNote: Flipkart charges a flat collection fee of ₹40 per order in addition to the commission. Fees are subject to 18% GST.
h1Title: Flipkart Mobile Phones Seller Fee Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate Flipkart seller fees for Mobile Phones. Find your 5.5% commission, collection fee, total deductions, and net payout for Flipkart mobile listings.
seoParagraph: Flipkart charges sellers a commission of 5.5% on the selling price for Mobile Phones listed on its platform, plus a flat collection fee of ₹40 per order. All fees on Flipkart are subject to 18% GST, which is charged additionally on the commission and collection fee amounts. Mobile phone sellers on Flipkart should use this calculator to accurately determine their net payout before listing products, especially in the highly competitive sub-₹15,000 segment.

feeNote: Flipkart charges a flat collection fee of ₹40 per order. Commission percentages may vary for sub-categories like laptops, cameras, and audio accessories.
metaDescription: Calculate Flipkart seller fees for Electronics. Compute your commission, collection fee, and net payout for electronics listings on Flipkart instantly.
seoParagraph: Flipkart charges a 7% commission on the selling price for Electronics, including consumer electronics, home appliances, and electronic accessories. A flat collection fee of ₹40 is charged per order, and all fees are subject to 18% GST. Electronics sellers on Flipkart should benchmark their pricing against both the platform fees and their logistics costs to ensure they maintain a viable margin in one of India's most competitive online shopping categories.

feeNote: Fashion & Clothing on Flipkart carries one of the highest commission rates. Flipkart's Myntra platform offers an alternative for premium fashion brands.
h1Title: Flipkart Fashion & Clothing Seller Fee Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate Flipkart seller fees for Fashion and Clothing. Find your 20% commission, collection fee, and exact net payout for apparel listings on Flipkart.
seoParagraph: Flipkart charges a commission of 20% on the selling price for Fashion and Clothing products, reflecting the high operational costs of the category including returns management, try-and-buy policies, and cataloguing. Combined with the ₹40 collection fee and 18% GST on total platform fees, fashion sellers on Flipkart must price their products carefully to remain profitable. This calculator helps clothing brands and resellers quickly determine their net payout before committing to a listing price.

feeNote: Collection fee for Home & Kitchen on Flipkart is approximately ₹30. Commission rates may vary for heavy furniture and large appliances.
h1Title: Flipkart Home & Kitchen Seller Fee Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate Flipkart Home & Kitchen seller fees. Find your 10% commission, collection fee, and net payout for home products listed on Flipkart instantly.
seoParagraph: Flipkart applies a 10% commission fee on the selling price for Home & Kitchen products, covering categories such as cookware, storage, furniture, and home décor. A collection fee of approximately ₹30 per order is also deducted, along with 18% GST on total platform charges. Home product sellers on Flipkart should calculate their exact net payout upfront to account for platform fees, inbound logistics to Flipkart warehouses, and packaging costs before setting their listing price.

feeNote: Myntra is a premium fashion platform with higher commissions reflecting brand positioning and higher average order values. Commission rates vary by brand tier.
metaDescription: Calculate Myntra seller fees for Fashion and Apparel. Find your 25% commission, fulfilment fee, and net payout for fashion brand listings on Myntra.
seoParagraph: Myntra, India's largest fashion e-commerce platform, charges a commission of approximately 25% on the selling price for Fashion and Apparel brands. In addition to the commission, a fulfilment fee and fixed per-order charge are applied, which can vary based on the seller's tier and agreement with Myntra. Fashion brands listing on Myntra benefit from higher brand visibility and premium positioning but must carefully model their net payout to ensure the higher commission rates are offset by the platform's strong conversion rates.

feeNote: Nykaa commission rates vary by brand tier and product category. Luxury beauty brands may negotiate lower rates. Rates are indicative and subject to individual seller agreements.
metaDescription: Calculate Nykaa seller fees for Beauty and Personal Care products. Find your commission, fulfilment fee, and net payout for beauty brand listings on Nykaa.
seoParagraph: Nykaa charges a commission of approximately 22% on the selling price for Beauty and Personal Care products sold through its marketplace. A per-order fulfilment fee is charged on top of the commission, making it essential for beauty brands to calculate their net payout before pricing their Nykaa listings. Despite the higher commission, Nykaa's highly targeted, purchase-intent audience for beauty products often delivers strong conversion rates and repeat customers, making it one of the most valuable platforms for beauty and skincare brands in India.
